43	func checkError(resp *http.Response, body []byte) error {
44		if resp.StatusCode < http.StatusBadRequest {
45			return nil
46		}
47	
48		if resp.StatusCode == http.StatusUnauthorized {
49			authError := AuthorizationError{StatusCode: resp.StatusCode}
50			json.Unmarshal(body, &authError)
51			return authError
52		}
53	
54		apiError := StatusError{StatusCode: resp.StatusCode}
55	
56		err := json.Unmarshal(body, &apiError)
57		if err != nil {
58			// Use the full body as the message if we fail to decode a response.
59			apiError.ErrorMessage = string(body)
60		}
61	
62		return apiError
63	}

65	// ClientFromEnvironment creates a new [Client] using configuration from the
66	// environment variable OLLAMA_HOST, which points to the network host and
67	// port on which the ollama service is listening. The format of this variable
68	// is:
69	//
70	//	<scheme>://<host>:<port>
71	//
72	// If the variable is not specified, a default ollama host and port will be
73	// used.
74	func ClientFromEnvironment() (*Client, error) {
75		return &Client{
76			base: envconfig.Host(),
77			http: http.DefaultClient,
78		}, nil
79	}

89		token, err := auth.Sign(ctx, []byte(challenge))

93		return token, nil

96	func (c *Client) do(ctx context.Context, method, path string, reqData, respData any) error {
97		var reqBody io.Reader
98		var data []byte
99		var err error
100	
101		switch reqData := reqData.(type) {
102		case io.Reader:
103			// reqData is already an io.Reader
104			reqBody = reqData
105		case nil:
106			// noop
107		default:
108			data, err = json.Marshal(reqData)
109			if err != nil {
110				return err
111			}
112	
113			reqBody = bytes.NewReader(data)

116		requestURL := c.base.JoinPath(path)

118		var token string
119		if envconfig.UseAuth() || c.base.Hostname() == "ollama.com" {
120			now := strconv.FormatInt(time.Now().Unix(), 10)
121			chal := fmt.Sprintf("%s,%s?ts=%s", method, path, now)
122			token, err = getAuthorizationToken(ctx, chal)
123			if err != nil {
124				return err
125			}
126	
127			q := requestURL.Query()
128			q.Set("ts", now)
129			requestURL.RawQuery = q.Encode()
130		}
131	
132		request, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, method, requestURL.String(), reqBody)
133		if err != nil {
134			return err
135		}
136	
137		request.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
138		request.Header.Set("Accept", "application/json")
139		request.Header.Set("User-Agent", fmt.Sprintf("ollama/%s (%s %s) Go/%s", version.Version, runtime.GOARCH, runtime.GOOS, runtime.Version()))
140

147		if name == "" {

151		model, err := GetModel(name)
152		if err != nil {
153			return nil, nil, nil, err
154		}
155	
156		if slices.Contains(model.Config.ModelFamilies, "mllama") && len(model.ProjectorPaths) > 0 {
157			return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("'llama3.2-vision' is no longer compatible with your version of Ollama and has been replaced by a newer version. To re-download, run 'ollama pull llama3.2-vision'")
158		}
159	
160		if err := model.CheckCapabilities(caps...); err != nil {
161			return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("%s %w", name, err)
162		}
163	
164		// Deprecated runner override option; ignore if present.
165		delete(requestOpts, "use_imagegen_runner")
166	
167		opts, err := s.modelOptions(model, requestOpts)
168		if err != nil {
169			return nil, nil, nil, err
170		}
171	
172		runnerCh, errCh := s.sched.GetRunner(ctx, model, opts, keepAlive)
173		var runner *runnerRef
174		select {
175		case runner = <-runnerCh:
176		case err = <-errCh:
177			return nil, nil, nil, err
178		}
179	
180		return runner.llama, model, &opts, nil
181	}

145	func isLocalhost() bool {
146		host := envconfig.Host()
147		h, _, _ := net.SplitHostPort(host.Host)

155	func CreateHandler(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
156		p := progress.NewProgress(os.Stderr)
157		defer p.Stop()
158	
159		// Validate model name early to fail fast
160		modelName := args[0]
161		name := model.ParseName(modelName)

163			return fmt.Errorf("invalid model name: %s", modelName)
164		}
165	
166		// Check for --experimental flag for safetensors model creation
167		experimental, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("experimental")
168		if experimental {
169			if !isLocalhost() {
170				return errors.New("remote safetensor model creation not yet supported")
171			}
172			// Get Modelfile content - either from -f flag or default to "FROM ."
173			var reader io.Reader
174			filename, err := getModelfileName(cmd)
175			if os.IsNotExist(err) || filename == "" {
176				// No Modelfile specified or found - use default
177				reader = strings.NewReader("FROM .\n")
178			} else if err != nil {
179				return err
180			} else {
181				f, err := os.Open(filename)
182				if err != nil {
183					return err
184				}
185				defer f.Close()
186				reader = f
187			}
